channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: A Colorblind Constitution Is Not Just a Partisan Pet Project
item.description: A Washington Post essay highlights an important concept but falls short.

item.title: The Muslim Brotherhood and the Fifth Column Within
item.description: Recent data points highlight the need to reassess the influence of the Islamist group.

item.title: The Role of a Lifetime: Making Crazy Horse
item.description: A majestic sculpture in the Badlands brings a compelling vision to life.

item.title: China's Reusable Rocket Breakthrough Calls for Private Space Response
item.description: Maintaining U.S. space leadership requires cutting red tape to foster innovation.
